configKey.description: Optional key under getResolvedConfig().modules.<configKey> for this module's project config.

exports.description: List of named exports the module barrel re-exports.

name.description: Module name. Must be unique across the registered set.

pairsWith.description: Optional stack name this module pairs with. The pairing is one-way (module -> stack); stacks need not enumerate paired modules.

prerequisites.description: Shell-free prerequisite checks. Each command is whitespace-split, no shell expansion; the first token is the executable, remaining tokens are arguments.

command.description: Prerequisite command, whitespace-split, no shell expansion.

errorHint.description: Human-readable hint surfaced when the prerequisite check fails.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Exact-match per F3.

stateKeys.description: Optional state keys the module reads/writes through getModuleState/setModuleState.
